signals.raw:
Trump announces US-Iran two-week ceasefire agreement ahead of 8 p.m. ET deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

signals.headline: YES** potential for upside if BTC stabilizes above $68K or Solana breaks $85–$95, driven by catalysts like Interactive B
signals.raw: YES** potential for upside if BTC stabilizes above $68K or Solana breaks $85–$95, driven by catalysts like Interactive Brokers' SOL trading launch for Europeans, Firedancer/Alpenglow upgrades (98.27% governance approval), and strong DeFi TVL (~$6B).[3][4][7]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation Rises to 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's headline CPI inflation increased to 2.16% year-on-year in March 2026 from 2.00% in February, with month-on-month inflation at 0.34%.[2]  
This uptick, amid steady February core inflation at 2.3% and rising upside risks from oil prices and KRW weakness, prompted ING to revise its 2026 CPI forec

signals.raw: NO** recent confirmations; content focuses on ongoing consolidation, historical April seasonality (+23–60% in green months), and bearish risks like head-and-shoulders patterns targeting $73 if $80 fails.[5][6]
